name: Behind the Iron Gate
self_description: We invite you to experience the ultimate in family fun or company team building at Behind the Iron Gate in Grass Valley. Our escape rooms are physical adventure games where players enter one of our themed environments and must use elements of the room to solve a series of puzzles, riddles, and challenges to progress and ultimately "escape."
